implement.description: Ability to implement changes in the Next.js application.

test.description: Ability to run Playwright tests and verify functionality.

debug.description: Ability to debug using Chrome DevTools.

workflow.description: Implement requested changes in the Next.js application.
Open the browser and test the changes using Playwright.
Use Chrome DevTools to debug any issues that arise.

shell.description: Shell/terminal MCP server. Gives the agent hands to run CLI commands: start Next.js dev server, run builds, execute npm scripts, and run Playwright test suites.
